headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk/opportunity (long-term, reputational and capital flows) — YES Bank pioneers India's first green bond, enhancing ESG credentials and green finance leadership.
what_matters: Possible minor P/E expansion if ESG funds increase holdings; no immediate margin impact.
Triggers BRSR, GRI, CDP, TCFD, DJSI, ESRS frameworks; no immediate regulatory deadline or penalty.
Potential for marginally lower cost of capital due to green premium; may attract ESG fund inflows.
